pointless_machine.page.spells_desc: I have uncovered a wealth of patterns from a hidden ancient library. Despite its security and obscurity, the library seems to have held frankly nonsensical patterns. I have nevertheless documented them here.
pointless_machine.page.spells.get_origin: Returns the origin of the world I cast it in. Free.
pointless_machine.page.spells.get_offlin: Returns a reference to a random offline player. Free.
pointless_machine.page.spells.get_self: Returns this pattern. Free. $(br)Oddly chimes a faint buzzing in my ear: perhaps its inventor was fond of bees.
pointless_machine.page.spells.concrete_d: Extract the water from the target concrete block, turning it back to concrete powder. Mishaps if the target is not concrete. One tenth of a pinch of amethyst dust is required.
pointless_machine.page.great_desc: The ancient library has a second level, predictably filled with more inane patterns. But the creators saw them fit to be sealed: perhaps the uselessness was a cover?
pointless_machine.page.great.touch_grass: Swiftly brings me in contact with nature. 10 $(l:items/amethyst)$(item)Charged Amethyst/$ is the price for this feat.
pointless_machine.page.great.enlightener: The target will achieve Enlightenment. A single amethyst shard is all this miracle requires. Only effective on armor stands.
